hero.title: Murilo Sanches

about.title: About
about.label: // Field Operative
about.description: Full Stack Developer with 5+ years of experience, specializing in React/Next.js and Java (Spring Boot). I build end-to-end solutions with a focus on performance, clean code, and reliable delivery — with solid background in Agile and technical mentorship.

next.description: A PoC to practice Next.js, exploring SSR/CSR and API integration in a clean, simple flow.

poizoni.description: Mobile app to identify venomous animals and guide the best next steps for care and treatment.

ecommerceCar.description: Front-end of an e-commerce platform for selling automotive parts, built with TypeScript.

newsGamification.description: Front-end for a news platform with gamification mechanics to engage readers through points and achievements.

portfolioSvelte.description: Personal portfolio built with Svelte, exploring the framework's reactivity and lightweight bundle.

solarSystem.description: Interactive 3D solar system simulation rendered on HTML5 Canvas using JavaScript.

blockchain.description: Web 3.0 application integrating React with blockchain, allowing crypto transactions via MetaMask.

musicPlayer.description: Music player integrated with the Spotify API, featuring playlist management and playback controls.

ciet.description: Technical leadership in full-stack development using React, Next.js, and Spring Boot — driving code quality, performance, and team delivery.
keyPoints: Led full-stack development with React, Next.js, and Spring Boot, improving code quality and team efficiency.
Migrated Spring Boot 2 to Spring Boot 3, mitigating critical security vulnerabilities.
Mentored interns, accelerating onboarding and reducing team delivery time by 20%.
achievements: Backend performance improved by 30% after the Spring Boot 3 migration.

ciet1.description: Architectural modernization of legacy systems and delivery of dynamic interfaces with Next.js and Tailwind CSS.
achievements: Migrated legacy projects from Node.js 12 + CRA to Node.js 18 + Vite, achieving 40% faster builds.
Planned and delivered dynamic interfaces using Next.js and Tailwind CSS.

ciet2.description: Development of responsive and dynamic interfaces with a focus on high-fidelity UI/UX and comprehensive unit testing.
keyPoints: Built responsive and dynamic web interfaces with a strong focus on high-fidelity UI/UX.
Implemented comprehensive unit tests with Jest and Vitest, ensuring application stability.

dextra.description: Frontend development using React JS for major financial sector clients (Alelo), contributing to large-scale and complex projects in an agile environment.

cotuca.course: High school + technical degree in IT
